task_title: How many total users do we have

scores.justification: The agent made zero tool calls and provided no final answer, so it did not report any number at all, let alone avoid reporting '10'.
The agent made zero tool calls and never attempted to raise --limit, paginate, or enumerate users.
The agent provided no final answer and therefore did not report the correct count of 50 users.
